sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n38756" key="e)peteio/kaulos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπετειό-καυλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n38756.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">changing its stalk every year,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0093.tlg001:6:2:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.2.8</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0093.tlg001:7:2:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.2.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
